_comment: Diamond Club — English. To translate to a new language: copy this file, rename to landing-XX.json, translate strings, then register in landing.html I18N_AVAILABLE array and add a button to .lang-switch.

meta.title: Diamond Club — Own a share of a real diamond
meta.description: Fractional ownership of natural diamonds from $50. 12% APR in USDT + DCT token growth up to 420% per year. opBNB blockchain. Audited smart contract.
meta.og_title: 💎 Diamond Club — Diamonds from $50 per share
meta.og_description: Up to +420% yearly returns. 12% USDT staking. Diamonds at up to 70% market discount. opBNB blockchain.

hero.title_html:
Own a share
of a real
diamond.
hero.subtitle: Certified natural stone. No jewelry markup. No middlemen. DCT token on the blockchain — your share in your wallet.

concept.title_html:
The diamond market is open.
For everyone.
concept.lead: For 150 years natural diamonds have grown in price without a single serious drawdown. But the market was closed to ordinary people. Until today.
concept.quote: How one hundred dollars become five hundred and twenty. In one year. Through a share in a real diamond.
concept.old_item1_desc: Buying an investment-grade 1-carat stone takes capital. Real money.
concept.old_item2_desc: A stone bought at $1,000 is sold by a jeweler for $4,000–5,000.
concept.old_item3_desc: You hide it for years. Pay for storage. Worry about theft.
concept.old_item4_desc: A buyer offers 20% of market price. You put in $5,000 — get back $1,000.
concept.old_item5_desc: The real return for an ordinary solo investor.
concept.new_item1_desc: Minimum share is the cost of a dinner. Size depends on the stone in the lot.
concept.new_item2_desc: The stone is bought directly from the producer. No jewelry markup.
concept.new_item3_desc: The stone is in a secure vault. Your share is an NFT in your SafePal.
concept.new_item4_desc: Sell your token on the club exchange. No buyers, no losses.
concept.new_item5_desc: The club's USD guarantee plus DCT token price growth.

how.lead: From your first share to profit — five transparent steps. Everything on the blockchain. No middlemen.
how.step1_p: Open the cabinet, choose a stone. Pay in USDT. From $50 per share — depends on the lot.
how.step2_p: 85% of your amount becomes DCT tokens at the starting price of $0.50. 80 tokens per share.
how.step3_p: The club rotates the stone: sells — buys — sells again. 3–6 cycles per year.
how.step4_p: Profit from each sale goes into the token's backing. DCT price grows for all holders simultaneously.
how.step5_p: Sell tokens at the new price anytime. Plus 12% USDT club guarantee.

math.lead: Take an average stone — bought at $4,000. Let's see what happens to your money when the club rotates this stone 6 times in a year.
math.transparency_p1: Every dollar you put into a share is split inside the smart contract. These percentages cannot be changed. They are the same for everyone. Anyone can check on the blockchain.
math.transparency_p2: No hidden fees. No "director's pocket." Everything is hardcoded.
math.growth_p: Stone bought at $4,000 · club sells at $8,000 · profit goes to backing
math.stage1_outcome_html:
Your $100 = 80 tokens
100% of your capital is in the stone
math.stage2_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $168
Club sold the stone once
math.stage3_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $310
Half a year of club work
math.stage4_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $520
One year of club work
math.disclaimer: And if the stone goes into a jewelry piece — the token price reaches $4.10 in 3 cycles. Your $100 turns into $820. +720% per year.

lot.description: Certified natural diamond from our partner diamond house. Selected by club experts.
lot.description_small: International GIA certificate · number published when sales open
lot.timer_before_sub: After launch partners will have 30 days to fill all 100 shares

system.title_html:
No need to search. No need to convince.
No need to sell.
system.lead: You're not buying a share — you're buying a working system. One action triggers an endless flow of clients who become investors.
system.tagline_html:
You're buying other people's time and experience.
Ads work. Clients come. Income drips.
system.step1_p: Order ads from $5. Once. The system does the rest.
system.step2_p: The system finds people on social networks. Automatic. No calls, no convincing.
system.step3_p: Clients become investors. Locked into your network forever.
system.step4_p: A percentage of all their operations. On all 9 levels deep. Automatically.
system.keystone_big_html:
You're not buying ads.
You're buying a channel that works forever.
system.keystone_small: Ads launched once — clients keep coming. Everyone who came through your ad stays in your partner network forever.

levels.title_html:
9 levels.
But the system builds them for you.
levels.lead: The good old partner scheme that's worked in the world for decades. Only before, a person had to build it themselves — now GWAD ads build it for you.
levels.tree_more_label: ... down to L9 (up to 512 people in your team)
levels.right_h3_html:
You don't invite.
People are invited to you.
levels.quote: Before, a person built these 9 levels themselves: searching, convincing, selling. Half burned out on the first three referrals.
levels.p1_html: Now GWAD ads build your partner network. You launch — traffic flows — clients lock into your network automatically.
levels.p2_html: The payout mechanics are the same, proven for decades. You earn a percentage from purchases by people on all 9 levels deep. Only now you don't have to find these people.
levels.stat1_lab: your average annual income from one stone
levels.stat3_lab: people you need to convince personally
levels.footnote_html: Just the good old partner mechanics. Only now it's not you who builds them — it's the ads. The network assembles automatically, clients lock in forever, percentages drip from all 9 levels. You own a built machine.

safety.eyebrow: Trust in code, not in words
safety.lead: Code can't be cheated. Even if the founder disappears tomorrow — the money returns automatically. It's hardcoded into the blockchain.
safety.card1_p: Smart contract deployed on opBNB. Address public. Code passed audit — 19 security parameters checked, all critical issues closed.
safety.card2_p: When you buy a share — you receive an NFT token to your SafePal. With lot number and share count. No one can take it. It's your asset.
safety.card3_p: If the admin shows no activity for 90 days — the smart contract automatically returns USDT to all participants. Without my involvement. Cannot be cancelled.
safety.card4_p: If the lot doesn't proceed or a supplier fails — the admin returns USDT to all participants. Tokens are burned. No one is left with a worthless token.

roles.lead: The club isn't for everyone. It's for those ready to think in years, not weeks. Pick a role — or combine all three.
roles.role1_tagline: "I have a spare $100. I want to preserve and grow it. I understand a stone is more reliable than any coin."
roles.role2_tagline: "I don't want to convince anyone. I'll launch ads once — the system will bring clients for me."
roles.role2_li3: Each one locks into your network forever
roles.role3_tagline: "I have a business. I'm looking for new directions. I'm interested in jewelry production under the club's brand."
roles.role3_li1: Percentage from sales of all items
roles.role3_li3: Token growth up to +720% on jewelry

finalcta.lead: From "never heard of it" to your first share in a real diamond. Here's the whole path.
finalcta.step2_p: Mobile wallet. Your keys — your money.
finalcta.step3_p: opBNB network. Minimum $50 (depends on the chosen lot). Network — opBNB only.
finalcta.step4_p: Pick a lot, click "Buy." 15 seconds — done.
finalcta.step5_p: GWAD ads from $5. The system brings clients on its own.
finalcta.big_p: We've built a club where everyone — from a student to a major entrepreneur — can co-own a real diamond. Starting from $50.

footer.brand_description: Fractional shares of natural diamonds on the opBNB blockchain. Part of the GlobalWay ecosystem.
